chain.symbol: Request.Do — calls Request.request() which sends HTTP POST via client.Do(req)
registerResourceHandlers — routes POST to restfulCreateResource → handlers.CreateResource
createHandler — deserializes body, runs admission, calls r.Create(ctx, name, obj, ...)
REST (embeds genericregistry.Store) — NewREST configures Store with deployment.Strategy
Store.Create → Store.create — runs BeforeCreate strategy, validates, calls Storage.Create(ctx, key, obj, out, ttl, dryRun)
DryRunnableStorage.Create — delegates to storage.Interface.Create unless dry-run
store.Create — encodes obj via runtime.Encode, encrypts via transformer, calls client.Kubernetes.OptimisticPut(ctx, key, data, 0) which issues etcd Txn(If key not exist, Then Put)
kvServer.Put — gRPC entry point, calls s.kv.Put(ctx, r)
EtcdServer.Put — wraps put into InternalRaftRequest, calls raftRequest
processInternalRaftRequestOnce — marshals request, calls s.r.Propose (Raft consensus)
applierV3backend.Put — after Raft commit, applies put to MVCC store via txn.Put(key, value, leaseID)
storeTxnWrite.put — creates revision, marshals KeyValue protobuf, writes to BoltDB via tx.UnsafeSeqPut, updates in-memory index
batchTx.UnsafeSeqPut — writes key-value to BoltDB bucket on disk

text:
The end-to-end Deployment creation flow spans 3 repos across 15 files:

**1. client-go (HTTP client):** `deployments` struct in `kubernetes/typed/apps/v1/deployment.go` embeds `gentype.Client`. The `Create()` in `gentype/type.go:244` builds a POST request via the fluent REST API (`c.client.Post().Resource().Body(obj).Do(ctx).Into(result)`). `Request.Do()` at `rest/request.go:1269` calls `Request.request()` which performs the actual `http.Client.Do(req)` with retry/throttle logic.

**2. kubernetes API server (request processing):** The POST route is wired in `installer.go:924` via `restfulCreateResource → handlers.CreateResource`. The `createHandler` in `handlers/create.go:53` deserializes the body, runs admission controllers (mutating + validating), then calls `r.Create()`. For Deployments, `REST` in `deployment/storage/storage.go:88` embeds `genericregistry.Store`. The `Store.Create()` at `store.go:446` runs `BeforeCreate` (which invokes `deploymentStrategy.PrepareForCreate` to clear status and set generation=1), runs validation, then calls `DryRunnableStorage.Create()` → `etcd3.store.Create()`. The etcd3 store at `etcd3/store.go:241` encodes the object via protobuf, encrypts it via the value transformer, then calls `OptimisticPut` which issues an etcd transaction (If key-version==0, Then Put) ensuring atomic create-if-not-exists.

**3. etcd (consensus + storage):** The gRPC `Put` arrives at `v3rpc/key.go:55`. `EtcdServer.Put()` in `v3_server.go:139` wraps it in an `InternalRaftRequest` and calls `raftRequest` → `processInternalRaftRequestOnce` which proposes it through Raft (`s.r.Propose`). After Raft consensus commits the log entry, `applierV3backend.Put()` in `apply.go:249` applies the change to the MVCC store. `storeTxnWrite.put()` in `kvstore_txn.go:190` creates a new revision, marshals the KeyValue protobuf, writes it to BoltDB via `UnsafeSeqPut` in `batch_tx.go:145`, and updates the in-memory B-tree index.
